labs.title: SQL Injection
labs.description: Exploit raw SQL query string concatenation to bypass login and extract records from the database.

labs.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
labs.description: Inject client-side scripts via reflected and stored XSS vectors. Steal cookies and deface pages.

labs.title: Cross-Site Request Forgery
labs.description: Force authenticated users to perform unintended actions via crafted cross-origin requests.

labs.title: Insecure Direct Object Reference
labs.description: Access other users data by manipulating predictable object reference IDs in URL parameters.

labs.title: Server-Side Template Injection
labs.description: Inject Jinja2 template expressions to read server config, traverse object MRO, and achieve RCE.

labs.title: XML External Entity (XXE)
labs.description: Exploit an unsafe XML parser to read local files and trigger internal SSRF via DTD declarations.

labs.title: JWT Authentication Bypass
labs.description: Exploit alg:none, weak HS256 secrets, and RS256-to-HS256 confusion attacks on JSON Web Tokens.

labs.title: API Security — BOLA
labs.description: Access other users orders via DRF endpoint missing object-level permission checks (BOLA/IDOR in API).

labs.title: Supply Chain Attack
labs.description: Demonstrate dependency confusion and typosquatting attack vectors in a sandboxed pip environment.

labs.title: SQL Injection (Node.js)
labs.description: Same vulnerability, different runtime. Demonstrates mysql2 query string concatenation vs parameterised queries.

labs.title: PHP SSTI / LFI
labs.description: Twig template engine injection and PHP include() file traversal in a containerised Apache/PHP environment.

owasp_2026_stubs.title: API Security Failures
owasp_2026_stubs.description: Dedicated category for REST/GraphQL/gRPC vulnerabilities breaking out from A01:2021.

owasp_2026_stubs.title: AI/ML Security Risks
owasp_2026_stubs.description: Prompt injection, model inversion, training data poisoning, insecure LLM deployment.

owasp_2026_stubs.title: Supply Chain Attacks
owasp_2026_stubs.description: Dependency confusion, typosquatting, compromised CI/CD pipelines.
